name: gutenberg-release
description: Phase-by-phase helper for coordinating a Gutenberg plugin release rotation — changelog curation, PR labeling, backports, builds, the "What's new" post, and X.Y.Z point releases.

interface.shortDescription: Guided workflows for Gutenberg plugin releases.
interface.longDescription: Phase-by-phase help for setup, RC builds, backports, What's new posts, stable releases, and patch releases.
defaultPrompt: Draft the Gutenberg What's new post
